title: Realistic Adult Asian Woman Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Realistic Adult Asian Woman Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dreamy warm-bedroom 35mm film portrait built around realistic adult Asian woman in a warm bedroom portrait, softly covered by a linen duvet, lying quietly under a blanket with a calm tender expression, soft focus, and relaxed morning posture, and sunlit apartment bedroom with cream bedding, warm gentle tones, pale wood, and shallow depth of field. Subject: realistic adult Asian woman in a warm bedroom portrait, softly covered by a linen duvet appears as the adult portrait subject, modestly covered by bedding, with natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, and realistic relaxed expression. Scene: sunlit apartment bedroom with cream bedding, warm gentle tones, pale wood, and shallow depth of field creates the warm cozy bedroom atmosphere with cream sheets, pale wood, soft daylight, subtle haze, and realistic shadows. Composition: lying quietly under a blanket with a calm tender expression, soft focus, and relaxed morning posture; fixed shallow depth of field, soft focus, tender atmosphere, close bedroom crop, blanket as foreground texture, and quiet film-photo intimacy. Signature Elements: Natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, cream blanket coverage, cozy bedroom texture, and warm film grain remain the source style anchors. Style: Dreamy 35mm film-style bedroom portrait with cinematic grain, warm gentle tones, soft natural light, realistic skin, and a tender editorial mood. Color Palette: Fixed cream bedding, warm beige wood, soft skin tones, gentle morning light, subtle haze, and low-contrast film color. Lighting: Soft natural window light with realistic shadows, warm highlights, and gentle haze. Camera: 35mm film aesthetic with shallow depth of field, soft focus edges, and realistic close portrait framing. Restrictions: Adult subject only, modest blanket coverage, coherent anatomy, realistic skin, calm bedroom portrait mood, clean background, polished film-photo finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Subject: realistic adult Asian woman in a warm bedroom portrait, softly covered by a linen duvet appears as the adult portrait subject, modestly covered by bedding, with natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, and realistic relaxed expression. Scene: sunlit apartment bedroom with cream bedding, warm gentle tones, pale wood, and shallow depth of field creates the warm cozy bedroom atmosphere with cream sheets, pale wood, soft daylight, subtle haze, and realistic shadows. Composition: lying quietly under a blanket with a calm tender expression, soft focus, and relaxed morning posture; fixed shallow depth of field, soft focus, tender atmosphere, close bedroom crop, blanket as foreground texture, and quiet film-photo intimacy. Signature Elements: Natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, cream blanket coverage, cozy bedroom texture, and warm film grain remain the source style anchors. Style: Dreamy 35mm film-style bedroom portrait with cinematic grain, warm gentle tones, soft natural light, realistic skin, and a tender editorial mood. Color Palette: Fixed cream bedding, warm beige wood, soft skin tones, gentle morning light, subtle haze, and low-contrast film color. Lighting: Soft natural window light with realistic shadows, warm highlights, and gentle haze. Camera: 35mm film aesthetic with shallow depth of field, soft focus edges, and realistic close portrait framing. Restrictions: Adult subject only, modest blanket coverage, coherent anatomy, realistic skin, calm bedroom portrait mood, clean background, polished film-photo finish.
